calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Stephen A. Fraser, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Brookside Skilled Nursing Hospital.
Elaine Zolfarelli, Adminstrator for plaintiff, and Diane Cook, Business Office Manager for plaintiff, were placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants robert Austin or The Adrian Perry Family Trust.
Defaults were entered agains defendants on November 5, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 18, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Brookside Skilled Nursing Hospital, and against the Defaulted Defendants Robert Austin and The Adrian Perry Family Trust as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,340.26.
Attorney's Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $464.75, for a total judgment in the amount of $32,630.01.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2010 Continued To Apr-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
